title: coleus blumei var. verschaffeltii
intro: Coleus blumei var. verschaffeltii, commonly known as Coleus verschaffeltii, is a variety of the Coleus blumei plant, belonging to the family Lamiaceae and native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus verschaffeltii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Coleus verschaffeltii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
